raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (homography augmentation for driving scene segmentation), shows where the draft drifts from it (the initial claim about cross-viewpoint evaluation), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (DeepLabv3+) and articulates the delta (1.6 mIoU improvement on Cityscapes).",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the 'below noise floor' comment on a 1.6-mIoU Cityscapes gap).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (unsupported causal claims, lack of loss curve).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (homography augmentation for driving scene segmentation), shows where the draft drifts from it (the initial claim about cross-viewpoint evaluation), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (DeepLabv3+) and articulates the delta (1.6 mIoU improvement on Cityscapes).
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the 'below noise floor' comment on a 1.6-mIoU Cityscapes gap).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (unsupported causal claims, lack of loss curve).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
